---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for AI Workbench
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Goal
What do you want to achieve?

## Problem / workflow gap
What current limitation or friction does this solve?

## Proposed solution
Describe the feature or workflow you want.

## Alternative ideas
List any alternatives you considered.

## Scope impact
Which area does this affect?
- [ ] annotation
- [ ] training center
- [ ] inspection center
- [ ] dataset center
- [ ] closed-loop center
- [ ] AI collaboration / OpenClaw
- [ ] UI / style / language
- [ ] docs / installation

## Additional context
Mockups, examples, screenshots, or references.
